text:
Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of computers to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and pattern recognition. Machine learning is a key part of AI where computers improve by learning from data without being explicitly programmed. Deep learning takes this further by using neural networks that mimic the human brain to handle complex tasks.

AI is already part of daily life. It powers recommendation systems on streaming services, assists in virtual assistants like Siri, and helps with personalized online ads. In healthcare, it can analyze medical images to detect diseases early. AI also improves security with facial recognition and makes travel easier through navigation apps.
